_comment: Lighter-heuristic rows. v0 builds ONE archetype for real (same-role geographic whitespace). The other two archetypes (adjacent-role, re-staff window) ship as STATIC 'also surfaced' rows with no bespoke detection logic yet — honest about what is and isn't built.

rows.headline: Stark Retail — re-staff window: 9 merchandiser assignments ending within 30 days (Chicago)
rows.rationale: Internal end-date scan only (no external join). A clustered set of assignments lapses by 2026-07-10; high win-rate to extend or re-staff before they roll off.
rows.evidence_note: Lighter heuristic — internal end-date scan, no external signal required.

rows.headline: Northwind Health — adjacent role-family (allied health) in Columbus
rows.rationale: We fill RN roles here; client is posting allied-health (Med Tech) roles we don't staff for them. Capability is proven on other healthcare accounts.

gm_band.basis: directional — allied-desk realized spread ($14), other-client allied fill (40%)

rows.caveat: Verify VMS scope before pursuit (notes flag a VMS in place). Marco is a skeptic AM — bring the evidence.
rows.evidence_note: Lighter heuristic — adjacent-role detection not built in v0; surfaced for AM judgment, not auto-scored.
